name: User cannot connect to VPN
description_no_html: User reports that VPN fails with timeout error when working from home. Internet works normally. Issue started this morning.

name: Server disk space critically low
description_no_html: Monitoring alert shows production file server has only 3% disk space remaining on C drive. Users are reporting slow file access.

name: New employee needs laptop setup
description_no_html: Manager requests laptop, Microsoft 365 account, VPN, and standard software setup for new hire starting next Monday.
